Explanation: Using `asterisk()` selects all columns from the ENTITY_WITH_AREA table, which can fetch unnecessary data and break if the schema changes. Replace with explicit column selection like `context.select(ENTITY_WITH_AREA.ENTITY_ID, ENTITY_WITH_AREA.TENANT_ID, ENTITY_WITH_AREA.LATITUDE, ENTITY_WITH_AREA.LONGITUDE, ENTITY_WITH_AREA.RADIUS, ENTITY_WITH_AREA.DESCRIPTION, new DistanceFrom(center))`.
